textbooks: Data Structures and Algorithm Analysis in C by Mark Allen Weiss
Fundamentals of Data Structures by Horowitz and Sahni
viva_expert_tips: JNTU examiners expect rotation diagrams for AVL tree insertions.
Explain collision resolution techniques (Linear Probing, Chaining) clearly.
common_10_mark_questions: Explain AVL tree rotations (LL, RR, LR, RL) with examples.
Discuss different Hashing techniques and collision resolution methods.

viva_expert_tips: Draw the instruction cycle diagram clearly with all phases.
Know the difference between direct, associative, and set-associative cache mapping.
common_10_mark_questions: Explain the instruction execution cycle with a neat diagram.
Discuss different cache memory mapping techniques with examples.
